title: Publish HappyTG 0.3.23 startup port fix release
acceptanceCriteria: All workspace package versions, CHANGELOG.md, and docs/releases/0.3.23.md are aligned at 0.3.23.
The startup-port fix from HTG-2026-04-19-startup-port-proof-loop remains the canonical product evidence for this release.
Fresh release validation passes after the metadata bump.
The release-ready commit is pushed on codex/release-0.3.23-startup-port-fix and merged to main.
The guarded GitHub Release workflow creates v0.3.23 from the latest main HEAD and the release proof bundle is finalized truthfully.
